the swinging mood that salesmen oscillate between and they oscillate between a state of unshakable confidence to a state of total panic and fear. And here's how it goes. ## [39:32 - 40:56]

towards the wrong thing so this is extremely important to remember and what you should do is download this pin up which is available beneath this video you can just download it to your computer and you definitely want to print this one out and pin it up on your wall or next to your desk because as we start making sales calls now and as we start taking action and testing your hypothesis with the market then it's so important that you don't fall for the pendulum of doubt you know there's only a few things that can mess with you right now and it's just understanding volume significance and iterations so if you pin this one up if you start to feel any emotion come on or any crazy thoughts come into your head and if you start to think about changing anything refer back to this pin up and calm yourself down and just keep going and remember you're just setting a hypothesis then doing 30 calls to collect feedback and then reflecting at that point and it's just an iterative process that works like that so that's it for this training video I hope you've enjoyed it make sure you download this worksheet print it out pin it up on your wall and I will see you in the next training module right now thanks
